name: moda
description: Create editable, brand-aligned slides and designs with Moda's MCP server and REST API skills.

interface.shortDescription: Create brand-aligned designs, decks, and exports.
interface.longDescription: Moda is an AI design agent for creating editable, brand-aligned slides, one-pagers, social posts, ads, graphics, and canvas exports. This plugin bundles the Moda MCP server setup with skills for conversational design workflows and REST API automation.
defaultPrompt: Create a branded pitch deck with Moda.
Turn this brief into a Moda design.
Use Moda's API for an export pipeline.
